data.text: THE SECOND WORLD IN THE FELIS SYSTEM, APPEARS TO BE A SUPER-JUPITER
GAS-GIANT, WITH LARGE STORMS AND NICE RINGS SPOTTED FROM ORBIT.
THE PRESENSE OF THIS WORLD HAS AN EXTREME EFFECT ON THE ORBITS OF THE
OTHER WORLDS OF THIS SYSTEM, ESPECIALLY THOSE IN THIS 1ST-ZONE.
THIS DECREASES OF FINDING A FELISIAN, LIVING WORLD, BUT IT'S NOT AT
